definitions: Introducing an alternative explanation or phrasing of something previously stated.
Used to rephrase or clarify a statement.
examples: He was late; put another way, he missed the deadline.
The project failed because of poor planning. Put another way, they didn't think it through.
She's very efficient. Put another way, she gets things done quickly.
